calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving appearance of Witness at Default Hearing is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the declaration of Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Lone Ranger Enterprises, Inc. and Beverly Pantuso as follows:
Damages $33,099.40
Prejudgment Interest $1,841.21
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $400.00, for a total of $37,840.61
Judgment signed in open court.
